programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The day kicks off with “The 1000-Yard Shot,” and the All-Stars are put to the test bright and early. Who will “make impact” and who will fall flat? Following the competition, Don receives a call from the CIA: the mission is officially greenlit, and it’s time for the All-Stars to kick things into high gear. This moment marks a pivotal shift in their training, with lives now hanging in the balance. After a crash course in the classroom, the All-Stars head to the field for what they think is a land navigation exercise… but things quickly spiral when a group of aggressive hostiles ambushes and captures the competitors for an intense hostage training scenario. Will any of them make it out—and live to tell the tale?

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: With a night of torture behind them and a morning packed with PT, the All-Stars set their sights on the mission ahead. When Don introduces a 200-meter shooting evolution using Ace Precision Firearms, the group is eager—though they didn’t expect an air mattress to be part of the equation. Later, Nemo Arms ups the ante with a challenge featuring three of their firearms and a rugged desert terrain course of fire. Just as the contestants begin to wind down for the day, Olight steps in to illuminate the path to the next round of challenges.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: This morning, the All-Stars are pulled up by their bootstraps to compete for a chance to win The Golden Boy. Who will rise to the occasion in this Western-themed challenge and take home a piece of true American craftsmanship? Next, the training turns cerebral with the help of BlazePod. With mental fortitude playing a critical role in mission success, Don goes above and beyond to ensure the contestants are mentally—and physically—ready for battle. Later, the team is introduced to a groundbreaking product designed to reduce draw time while under enemy fire.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: In this episode, the contestants are off and running, putting what they've learned so far into practice and reaping the rewards. Now it's your turn! Learn what these pros have been learning and how you can use it to improve the value of your home and the safety and happiness of your life.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s time to break down what the A-Team has learned from our latest group of companies—and how we can best support them in reaching their goals. Today, the spotlight is on A-Team member Larry Ward of Market Rithm. This seasoned CEO has seen it all when it comes to marketing strategy—and he’s got the accolades to prove it. Now, he’s setting his sights on helping businesses gain a competitive edge in their marketing efforts. Next, we’re introduced to another powerhouse on Kevin’s team: Nate Bailey, founder of Unleash the Leader Within. Nate brings a dynamic, personalized approach to scaling businesses that have often been overlooked. Rounding out this insightful roundtable discussion are A-Team members Chandler Kline from PICMII Crowdfunding and podcaster Dr. Jason Dean, each contributing their own unique areas of expertise.

programme.desc:

Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S1E1 Skate
programme.desc: This episode features the inspiring story of founders Miguel and Isabel. Driven by the belief that kids should be free to just be kids, #GoProForACause partner SanSkate is making a real difference in their community. Their mission is to provide a safe space for children who enter the workforce at a young age, giving them a chance to set aside their struggles and enjoy skateboarding. The episode also showcases the very best of GoPro skateboarding, featuring incredible talent from Andrew Brophy, Sewa Kroetkov, Madars Apse, and more.

programme.title: S1E2 Skate
programme.desc: Watch the inspiring story of Mike Rogers, an all-around skateboarding star from Cocoa Beach, FL. A regular competitor at top events around the world, including the Vans Pro-Tec Pool Party, Vans Bowl-A-Rama at Bondi Beach, and the Clash at Clairemont, Mike showcases his skill, style, and dedication to the sport. The episode also features Leticia Bufoni and Cata Diaz as she shares her perspective on women in skateboarding and explains why MACBA in Barcelona has become a world-renowned destination for skaters, with its iconic plaza, unique architecture, and perfectly smooth concrete.

programme.title: S1E3 Skate
programme.desc: Experience the very best of GoPro skateboarding at MACBA, Barcelona, celebrated worldwide as the ultimate Spanish skateboarding mecca. In 2018, we teamed up with Macba Life to follow the local skating community and capture the most jaw-dropping tricks this iconic plaza has to offer. Don’t miss this unforgettable collaboration with #MacbaLife.

programme.title: The Trusted Outlaw 1937
programme.desc: In The Trusted Outlaw, cowboy star Bob Steele delivers action and grit as a reformed outlaw trying to walk the straight path. But when a ruthless gang frames him for crimes he didn’t commit, he’s forced back into the saddle to clear his name. With fast-paced gunfights, high-stakes drama, and Steele’s trademark toughness, this Western proves that sometimes it takes an outlaw’s courage to bring true justice to the frontier.

programme.title: The Gambling Terror
programme.desc: Brett runs a protection racket for an unknown boss. When Jeff Hayes arrives and opens a gambling den, they try to shut him down. Unlike the others who have given in, he plans to fight back.

programme.title: Frontier Town
programme.desc: Regan is passing off counterfeit money at rodeos betting on his man Denby. When Tex appears and wins all the events, Regan has him accused of murder. As Tex looks for the counterfeiters, his pals Stubby and Pee Wee keep the Sheriff off his trail.

programme.title: Roll On Texas Moon 1946
programme.desc: Roy Rogers rides tall in Roll On Texas Moon, a Western packed with action, music, and romance. When a bitter feud erupts between cattlemen and sheep ranchers, Roy steps in to prevent bloodshed and uncover the schemers fueling the conflict. With Dale Evans, George ‘Gabby’ Hayes, and the Sons of the Pioneers along for the ride, the film blends fast-paced adventure, trail songs, and Texas charm into a classic Roy Rogers showdown.
